office_does: The coroner investigates qualifying deaths, determines cause and manner, maintains records, and works with families and justice agencies.
race_blurb: Incumbent Warren McLeod faces chief deputy Chelsie Niemcziek and candidate Jessica Stickley.

candidates.summary: Niemcziek is the chief deputy coroner and presents continuity and readiness to lead.

experience.basis: Current chief-deputy service provides a substantial office record short of elected incumbency.

candidates.summary: Stickley is a filed candidate for coroner without an identity-safe detailed biography or platform in the dossier.
highlights: Official and local election coverage verify her candidacy [S1][S2].

candidates.summary: McLeod has served as coroner since 2011 and teaches forensics.
highlights: Has held the elected office since 2011 [S2][S3].

experience.basis: Sixteen years as elected coroner provide a maximal proven office record.
